theories_explored.name: Entanglement Phase Gravity (EPG)
theories_explored.status: INTERESTING (7.2→5.5: no graviton mechanism, scalar order parameter cannot produce spin-2, relies on AdS/CFT for only rigorous results)

theories_explored.name: DQCP Gravity (Grand Merger)
theories_explored.status: INTERESTING (7.3→5.0: framework without calculations, all concrete claims reduce to FDCG or are vacuous)
theories_explored.key_insight: ITERATION 13 DEEP SCRUTINY with literature survey. KEY FINDINGS: (1) SU(2) DQCP now consensus WEAKLY FIRST-ORDER, not continuous (D'Emidio+Sandvik 2025, bootstrap exclusion, Nordic walking mechanism). No true fixed point = no universal exponents. (2) CDT spectral dimension D_S(sigma)=4.02-119/(54+sigma) implies nu_eff~0.50 for crossover, remarkably close to DQCP nu=0.455(2) from Sandvik-Zhao 2020. This coincidence is interesting but likely accidental — 1/sigma crossover is generic. (3) Horava-Lifshitz explains d_s=2→4 MORE SIMPLY via d_s=1+D/z with z=3→1, no critical exponents needed. (4) Two incompatible length scales at DQCP (nu~0.45 and nu'~0.78) — which one for gravity? (5) SO(5) excluded by conformal bootstrap. (6) z=1 confirmed — one positive result for emergent Lorentz. (7) Still no Z, no propagator, no calculation. Score 5.8: residual conceptual value + phase transition framing + fracton connection remain important contributions.

theories_explored.name: Fracton Dipole Condensate Gravity (FDCG)
theories_explored.status: PROGRAM LEADER (7.3→6.5→6.8→7.0→6.5→7.0→6.8: Effective Lorentz works but d=4 LIV naturalness unresolved)
theories_explored.key_insight: ITERATION 15 FINAL VERDICT ON EMERGENT LORENTZ: Outcome B (Effective Lorentz) at 75-80% confidence. Exact Lorentz (Outcome A) ruled unlikely (5-10%) — no mechanism in 3+1D, DQCP weakly first-order, radiative LIV instability, 17yr Horava failure. Meissner-enhanced K from s-wave condensation drives c_L >> c_T, decoupling scalar at E << M_Pl. GR recovered as EFT with Planck-suppressed anisotropic corrections. All observational bounds satisfied: GW170817 requires c_L/c_T > 6e7 (easily achieved by Meissner), LIV corrections dimension-6+ suppressed by M_Pl^2. Vainshtein screening from elastic nonlinearities provides additional protection. Strong coupling problem RESOLVED because c_0 >> 1 pushes Lambda_strong >> M_Pl. Weinberg bootstrap bypassed — GR recovered as EFT, not from exact symmetry. This is SUFFICIENT for physics: every UV completion modifies GR at Planck scale. FDCG classification: UV-complete theory producing GR as low-energy EFT with Planck-suppressed LIV corrections and falsifiable Oppenheim decoherence prediction.

theories_explored.name: FDCG Propagator Calculation + Oppenheim Point
theories_explored.key_insight: First calculation in the program. Conditional propagator: IF g2=0, matches GR exactly. Key unproven step: gauge enhancement (Goldstone->gauge parameters). Literature confrontation revealed spin-1 no-go, DOF mismatch, July 2025 mischaracterization. Oppenheim point: sigma_a=sqrt(G*hbar/R^3), testable with 10um diamond, consistent with all current experiments. FDCG revised from 7.3->6.5.

theories_explored.name: Gauge Enhancement Calculation (Make-or-Break)
theories_explored.status: CONTESTED -- ADJUDICATED: ALGEBRAICALLY PROVEN, DYNAMICALLY CONDITIONAL
theories_explored.key_insight: 5 agents disagreed sharply (3 YES, 2 NO). Host adjudication: (1) Fracton-elasticity duality PROVES gauge enhancement at linearized level. (2) Stueckelberg decomposition A_ij=1/2(d_iu_j+d_ju_i)+h_ij gives h_ij linearized diffeo gauge. (3) Elitzur's theorem objection is MISAPPLIED. (4) BUT: dynamically conditional on s-wave condensation. P-wave gives flat NG = fails. The question reduces to: is s-wave preferred?

theories_explored.name: S-wave vs P-wave Verdict (Final Arbiter)
theories_explored.key_insight: Literature survey: NO published work computes relative free energy. The question is model-dependent. BUT: s-wave has TWO independent thermodynamic advantages (Meissner energy + spin-1 stabilization) that p-wave lacks. No known mechanism suppresses s-wave in fracton systems (unlike He-3 paramagnons). Elasticity dual requires crystal = s-wave. Both phases exist in phase diagram with cosmological p-wave(Horava)->s-wave(GR) transition. Controlling parameter: angular dependence of V(theta). FDCG score raised to 7.0.

theories_explored.name: Scalar Mode Constraint Analysis (CORRECTED)
theories_explored.status: RESOLVED: SCALAR MODE NOT ELIMINATED — 5 DOF CONFIRMED
theories_explored.key_insight: CORRECTION of prior optimistic claim. Deep literature analysis confirms: Afxonidis et al. (2024) canonical analysis finds 5 propagating DOF (2 spin-2, 2 spin-1, 1 spin-0). All 6 constraints are second-class (not first-class like GR). The Hamiltonian constraint of GR is ABSENT. The Gauss law (double divergence) constrains longitudinal-longitudinal E^{ij} but NOT the trace. Stueckelberg decomposition redistributes gauge structure but adds no new constraints. S-wave condensation Higgses spin-1 but spin-0 is a gauge singlet, unaffected. The scalar problem is isomorphic to Horava gravity's extra mode. Three viable paths: (A) mass gap, (B) scalar as prediction, (C) RG flow to g2=0. FDCG score revised DOWN to 6.5.

theories_explored.name: DQCP Gravity Scrutiny — Critical Exponents & CDT Fit
theories_explored.key_insight: QUANTITATIVE ANALYSIS with full literature survey. (1) SU(2) DQCP is weakly first-order per 2024-2025 consensus: Nordic walking mechanism (Janssen+, Nature Comms 2025), bootstrap exclusion of SO(5) CFT, N_c between 7-8 for genuine conformal DQCP. (2) CDT fit D_S(sigma)=4.02-119/(54+sigma) implies crossover nu_eff~0.50, close to DQCP nu=0.455(2) — interesting coincidence but 1/sigma is generic. (3) Horava-Lifshitz gives d_s=1+D/z with z=3→1, producing d_s=2→4 WITHOUT free parameters — simpler than DQCP. (4) Two length scales (nu~0.45, nu'~0.78) at condensed matter DQCP — ambiguity for gravitational mapping. (5) eta_N~0.26-0.35, eta_VBS poorly determined, SO(5) exclusion. (6) z=1 confirmed — emergent Lorentz works. (7) Pseudo-critical exponents drift with system size — not truly universal. Detailed analysis in DQCP-SCRUTINY.md.

theories_explored.name: EPG Graviton Scrutiny — Spin-2 from Entanglement Transitions
theories_explored.key_insight: COMPREHENSIVE LITERATURE SURVEY of all three candidate mechanisms. (1) Mutual info as metric (Van Raamsdonk 2010, Cao-Carroll 2018): works ONLY within AdS/CFT, requires holographic duality as axiom, not derivation from MIPT. Faulkner et al. (2014) derives linearized Einstein from entanglement first law but ASSUMES Ryu-Takayanagi. (2) Random tensor network graviton (Hayden et al. 2016): RTN reproduces RT formula but NO perturbation spectrum computed, NO spin-2 mode isolated, tensor network perturbation theory undeveloped. (3) Replica field theory (Jian-You-Vasseur-Ludwig 2019+): maps MIPT to NLSM on replica group manifold — fluctuations are in replica space, NOT physical space, NO connection to gravity. FUNDAMENTAL PROBLEM: MIPT order parameter is SCALAR (entanglement entropy), not tensor. Getting spin-2 from scalar requires mechanism EPG does not provide. Shape-derivative approach (d^2 S/d(shape)^2) is the ONE speculative path forward but has ZERO published calculations. Comparison with FDCG devastating: FDCG has rank-2 gauge field, Goldstone mechanism, explicit tensor structure. EPG has none of this. Detailed analysis in EPG-GRAVITON-SCRUTINY.md.

theories_explored.name: FDCG Emergent Lorentz — Final Verdict
theories_explored.status: VERDICT DELIVERED: OUTCOME B (EFFECTIVE LORENTZ) AT 75-80% CONFIDENCE
theories_explored.key_insight: Three outcomes analyzed. A (exact Lorentz, 5-10%): no 3+1D mechanism, DQCP weakly first-order, LIV radiative instability 10^{-38}, Horava unsolved 17yr. B (effective Lorentz, 75-80%): Meissner c_L>>c_T, scalar decouples below M_Pl, GR as EFT + dim-6 corrections suppressed by M_Pl^2, all bounds satisfied (GW170817 needs c_L/c_T>6e7, easily achieved), strong coupling resolved (c_0>>1 → Lambda_strong>>M_Pl), Vainshtein screens residual scalar. C (no Lorentz, 10-15%): requires anomalously weak condensate contradicting s-wave thermodynamics, even then Vainshtein screening saves phenomenology. OUTCOME B IS SUFFICIENT FOR PHYSICS: every UV completion modifies GR at Planck scale, FDCG's specific modifications (anisotropic dispersion) are distinctive predictions not bugs. FDCG score: 6.5→7.0.

theories_explored.name: FDCG Speed Ratio c_L/c_T — Quantitative Calculation
theories_explored.status: CALCULATED: c_L/c_T QUANTIFIED — DOUBLE SUPPRESSION MECHANISM
theories_explored.key_insight: Four quantitative calculations. (1) Meissner K: K_Meissner=q^2*v0^2, scalar mass m_L~M_Pl, effective c_L/c_T~M_Pl/E. Key: MASS GAP not bare speed ratio provides decoupling. (2) Poisson ratio: FREE PARAMETER not fixed by gauge structure. (3) LIV: n=2,m=2, dim-6 operators, E_LIV~M_Pl. GRB satisfied by 8 orders, GW170817 by 21. (4) DQCP: z=1 forces c_L=c_T at transition, deviations~(E/M_Pl)^2 in ordered phase. Two mechanisms (Meissner gap + QCP locking) give DOUBLE protection.

promising_theories.name: Fracton Dipole Condensate Gravity (FDCG)
promising_theories.status: PROGRAM LEADER — Effective Lorentz works, d=3 LIV protected by fracton gauge, d=4 naturalness unresolved

research_frontiers.promise: HIGHEST — determines if LIV bounds are satisfied
research_frontiers.notes: Compute c_L/c_T from condensate parameters. Need c_L/c_T > 6e7 (GW170817 bound). The Meissner enhancement of bulk modulus K from U(1) Higgsing should give c_L/c_T ~ M_Pl/E_condensate. Quantitative calculation needed.
Compute Vainshtein radius from elastic anharmonic potential. Need r_V >> solar system scale for solar system tests. Estimate r_V = (r_g * L^2)^{1/3} where L is the strong coupling scale.

Derive the dim-6 operators in the EFT expansion. These are anisotropic dispersion corrections: omega^2 = k^2 + alpha * k^4/M_Pl^2. The coefficient alpha is computable from the condensate and distinguishes FDCG from string theory alpha' corrections.

research_frontiers.promise: HIGH — needed for full phenomenological viability
research_frontiers.notes: Matter fields as quasiparticles of the fracton condensate must all propagate at the same c_T. Need mechanism to lock all speeds together. Species-dependent LIV constrained to < 10^{-15}.

research_frontiers.promise: HIGH — first nonlinear test of GR recovery
research_frontiers.notes: Derive the 3-graviton vertex from the elastic cubic anharmonic potential. Must match the GR vertex from S_EH expansion. This tests nonlinear GR recovery in Outcome B.

research_frontiers.promise: HIGH — survives regardless, program's strongest result
research_frontiers.notes: sigma_a=sqrt(G*hbar/R^3) is independent of everything. Refine the prediction and compare with upcoming Bouwmeester diamond OMC experiment.

Confront FDCG's Outcome B predictions against ALL LIV bounds: GRB time delays, neutrino oscillations, photon birefringence, graviton speed (GW170817), PPN parameters, binary pulsar decay. Need all to pass.

cross_connections.connection: FDCG lives at g2≠0 in the Blasi-Maggiore family. The scalar mode propagates for ANY g2≠0. S-wave condensation may drive g2->0 via RG flow, but this is unproven.
Afxonidis (2024): spin-1 sector unbounded below. S-wave condensation gaps spin-1 via Higgs mechanism -> instability CURED. This part works. The spin-0 problem is separate.
cross_connections.promise: POSITIVE for spin-1, IRRELEVANT for spin-0

cross_connections.connection: First quantitative prediction: sigma_a=sqrt(G*hbar/R^3). Testable with 10um diamond microspheres. INDEPENDENT of everything. The program's strongest result.

The scalar graviton problem in FDCG is ISOMORPHIC to the extra scalar mode in Horava gravity. Both arise from restricted diffeomorphisms. Horava community has not solved this in 17 years. FDCG inherits this problem.
On dS backgrounds, partially massless graviton has 4 DOF (no spin-0). If FDCG condensate creates effective dS, scalar elimination may be automatic via PM gauge symmetry.
Phase diagram predicts d_s: 2 (p-wave/Horava) -> 4 (s-wave/GR), matching CDT data for spectral dimension running. The crossover function is now COMPUTABLE from the phase transition.
cross_connections.promise: HIGH -- testable against existing CDT data

cross_connections.connection: The duality maps s-wave to crystal, p-wave to smectic/hexatic. Crystal is the fully ordered ground state -> supports s-wave as ground state. Duality provides physical picture: geometrogenesis = crystallization.

FDCG with g2≠0 shares the scalar mode problem with massive gravity. The Fierz-Pauli tuning (mass term h_ij h^ij - h^2) eliminates the BD ghost but not the scalar polarization. In FDCG, the scalar is not a ghost (Afxonidis confirms stability) but IS an extra propagating DOF.
cross_connections.promise: STRUCTURAL PARALLEL -- same problem, different context

cross_connections.connection: DQCP's real contribution was conceptual: it identified the phase transition framing, the fracton connection (via Synthesizer), and the CC-as-criticality idea. All concrete content was cashed in by FDCG. DQCP was the scaffold; FDCG was the building.

FDCG Outcome B is ISOMORPHIC to the 'healthy extension' of Horava-Lifshitz gravity. BPS (2009-2011) showed scalar decouples when c_0 >> c. FDCG provides the MICROSCOPIC MECHANISM for why c_0 >> c: Meissner enhancement from s-wave condensation. BPS was phenomenological; FDCG gives the UV completion.
cross_connections.promise: VERY HIGH -- FDCG is the UV completion of healthy HL gravity

cross_connections.connection: The Meissner enhancement c_L >> c_T in FDCG is the GRAVITATIONAL ANALOG of the Anderson-Higgs mechanism in superconductors. In superconductors: longitudinal photon gets plasma mass, only transverse propagates. In FDCG: scalar graviton gets ultra-high speed, only 2 transverse propagate at low E. Same physics, higher rank.

learnings: ITERATION 9 BREAKTHROUGH: First calculation in the program. The conditional propagator matches GR if g2=0.
The Blasi-Maggiore framework (2022) is THE correct mathematical setting for fracton-graviton physics.
ITERATION 10 CONTESTED -- 5 agents disagreed (3 YES, 2 NO). Host adjudication: ALGEBRAICALLY PROVEN, DYNAMICALLY CONDITIONAL.
The fracton-elasticity duality + Stueckelberg decomposition PROVE gauge enhancement at linearized level. This is exact mathematics.
The Stueckelberg decomposition: A_ij = 1/2(d_iu_j+d_ju_i) + h_ij. Under du_i=xi_i, h_ij transforms under linearized diffeos. Rigorous.
Elitzur's theorem objection is MISAPPLIED: it prohibits gauge BREAKING, not emergent gauge ENHANCEMENT.
The mechanism is Stueckelberg, not inverse Higgs. The algebra [P_i,D_j]=delta_ij Q provides kinematic structure.
DYNAMICAL CONDITION: s-wave (U(1)+dipole broken) -> z=1 -> GR. P-wave (dipole only) -> z=2 -> Horava.
Geometrogenesis = CRYSTALLIZATION. Condensate = crystal. Phonons = gravitons.
Spin-1 instability REFRAMED as condensation driver toward s-wave.
The Pretko-Radzihovsky duality is exact and provides the Stueckelberg fields.
The Oppenheim point sigma_a=sqrt(G*hbar/R^3) is INDEPENDENT of everything.
ITERATION 11 VERDICT: S-wave is generically preferred (75-80% confidence).
TWO independent thermodynamic arguments favor s-wave: (1) Meissner energy gain from U(1) Higgsing, (2) spin-1 instability stabilization via gapping. P-wave has ZERO unique energy-lowering mechanisms.
NO published work computes the relative free energy of s-wave vs p-wave in fracton systems. The question is formally model-dependent.
The controlling microscopic parameter is the angular dependence of the dipole-dipole interaction V(theta). Isotropic attractive = s-wave. Angular structure = possibly p-wave.
In BCS theory, p-wave only wins with specific suppression mechanism (paramagnons in He-3). No known fracton analog of paramagnons.
BOTH phases likely exist in the FDCG phase diagram: p-wave (Horava, z=2) at high T, s-wave (GR, z=1) as ground state.
Cosmological scenario: early universe p-wave (Horava, UV-renormalizable) -> late universe s-wave (GR) via Lifshitz transition.
The p-wave->s-wave transition could leave observable GW signatures and explains CDT spectral dimension running d_s: 2->4.
FDCG is viable in BOTH scenarios: s-wave gives GR directly, p-wave gives Horava which flows to GR via RG.
The spin-1 instability (Afxonidis 2024) is now understood as EVIDENCE FOR s-wave: tachyonic instabilities drive toward the phase that eliminates them.
Honesty about the literature is more valuable than optimistic spin. The program is stronger for confronting its gaps.
METHODOLOGICAL: Rigorous calculation > hand-waving. Literature survey > wishful thinking.
ITERATION 12 CORRECTION: The scalar mode IS a propagating DOF. Previous agent's claim of Hamiltonian constraint elimination was WRONG.
Afxonidis et al. (2406.19268) is the definitive reference: 5 propagating DOF (2 spin-2, 2 spin-1, 1 spin-0). All constraints second-class.
The Hamiltonian constraint of GR is ABSENT in fracton gravity due to reduced gauge symmetry (1 parameter vs 4).
The Gauss law (∂_i∂_j E^{ij} = 0) constrains longitudinal-longitudinal E^{ij}, NOT the trace. It is NOT a Hamiltonian constraint.
Stueckelberg decomposition redistributes gauge parameters but does NOT add new constraints. Total constraint count is invariant.
S-wave condensation Higgses spin-1 (gauge charged) but NOT spin-0 (gauge singlet). Different mechanisms needed.
The scalar graviton problem in FDCG is isomorphic to the extra mode in Horava-Lifshitz gravity. 17 years unsolved in that context.
Three viable paths: (A) dynamic mass gap m_scalar >> E_obs, (B) scalar as testable prediction, (C) RG flow to g2=0.
Partially massless gravity on dS backgrounds eliminates spin-0 via enhanced scalar gauge symmetry. Potential connection to FDCG if condensate creates effective dS.
CRITICAL LESSON: Always confront published literature directly. The Afxonidis paper settles this question. Do not argue against published canonical analysis without equally rigorous counterargument.
FDCG score revised DOWN from 7.0 to 6.5. The scalar mode problem is the same severity as the gauge enhancement problem was before iteration 10.
ITERATION 13 QUANTITATIVE SCRUTINY: DQCP Gravity subjected to same rigor as FDCG iterations 9-12. Deep literature survey of 2024-2025 condensed matter results.

CRITICAL FINDING: SU(2) Neel-VBS DQCP is now consensus WEAKLY FIRST-ORDER. Nordic walking mechanism (Janssen+, Nature Comms 2025) explains pseudo-criticality via flat beta function. Bootstrap excludes SO(5) symmetric CFT.

DQCP critical exponents — best values: nu=0.455(2) from Sandvik-Zhao 2020 (two-length-scale analysis), nu'=0.78(3) for second length scale. eta_N=0.26(3) to 0.35(3) depending on method. eta_VBS poorly determined. z=1 confirmed.

TWO incompatible length scales at the DQCP: nu~0.45 (VBS correlation length) and nu'~0.78 (Neel correlation length). Ratio nu'/nu ~ 1.7. This ambiguity is fatal for the spectral dimension formula which assumes a single nu.
CDT spectral dimension: D_S(sigma) = 4.02 - 119/(54+sigma) from Ambjorn-Jurkiewicz-Loll 2005. UV: d_s ~ 1.82. IR: d_s ~ 4.02. The 1/sigma crossover at large sigma implies nu_eff ~ 0.50.

INTERESTING COINCIDENCE: CDT crossover nu_eff ~ 0.50 is close to DQCP nu = 0.455(2). But 1/sigma is the SIMPLEST possible crossover, and Horava-Lifshitz produces the same d_s=2→4 running via d_s=1+D/z with z=3→1, NO free parameters.

DIMENSIONAL REDUCTION IS UNIVERSAL: CDT, asymptotic safety, HL gravity, LQG, causal sets, NCG, and string theory ALL find d_s → ~2 in UV. This is NOT evidence for DQCP specifically — it's evidence for something generic about quantum gravity.
SO(5) symmetry at DQCP: EXCLUDED by conformal bootstrap bounds (2024). Genuine conformal DQCPs only exist for SU(N >= 8) — far from the SU(2) relevant to gravity.

Nordic walking = beta function flat over range of couplings → logarithmic RG flow → pseudo-critical regime spanning many decades → mimics continuous transition. Effective exponents DRIFT with system size, never converge.
Horava-Lifshitz comparison: d_s = 1+D/z is a KINEMATIC consequence of anisotropic scaling. No critical exponents needed. Simpler explanation for the same phenomenon. Occam's razor disfavors DQCP.

SCORING PRINCIPLE: A theory with no Z, no propagator, no definitive critical exponents, and no computation cannot score above 6. Conceptual value (phase transition framing, fracton connection) gives partial credit.

DQCP Gravity's real contributions to the program: (1) phase transition framing for geometrogenesis, (2) fracton connection via Synthesizer, (3) CC-as-criticality idea, (4) motivation for FDCG. These survive even as the specific DQCP mechanism fails.

METHODOLOGICAL LESSON: Never let a theory sit unscrutinized at the top of the leaderboard. The 2024-2025 condensed matter developments (Nordic walking, bootstrap exclusion, weakly first-order consensus) were available and should have been checked earlier.

PATH FORWARD: If DQCP Gravity is to be rescued, Path B (pseudo-critical regime is wide enough to be physically relevant) is the most viable. But this weakens the theory from 'universal predictions from critical exponents' to 'approximate predictions from approximate exponents.'

ITERATION 14 EPG GRAVITON SCRUTINY: The scalar-to-tensor problem is REAL and UNRESOLVED. MIPT order parameter S(A) is a scalar. No known Landau-Ginzburg mechanism promotes scalar order parameter to rank-2 tensor fluctuations.
Van Raamsdonk (2010) is QUALITATIVE only — argues entanglement = glue of spacetime within AdS/CFT, does NOT derive metric from entanglement, does NOT compute propagator.

Faulkner et al. (2014) / Lashkari et al. (2014) is the STRONGEST result: entanglement first law for all ball-shaped regions is EQUIVALENT to linearized Einstein equations in AdS bulk. This IS spin-2. BUT: requires Ryu-Takayanagi (holographic duality) as input.
Cao-Carroll (2016-2018): Radon transform can reconstruct metric from entanglement data, but ASSUMES entanglement structure already has right form. Circular for the question of WHY geometry emerges.

Hayden-Nezami-Qi-Swingle (2016): random tensor networks reproduce RT formula with large bond dimension. BUT: no perturbation spectrum, no graviton mode isolated, tensor network perturbation theory is undeveloped field.

MIPT replica field theory (Jian-You-Vasseur-Ludwig 2019+): maps to NLSM on permutation group / orthogonal matrix target space. Fluctuations are in REPLICA space, not physical space. NO connection to gravity. Structurally identical to Anderson localization replica theories.
The 1/k^2 entanglement propagator claimed by EPG's Theorist sub-agent is SCALAR, not TENSOR. Having 1/k^2 only means massless — could be any spin. Graviton needs (P^TT)_{ijkl}/k^2.

SHAPE-DERIVATIVE APPROACH: Define entanglement metric as d^2 S(A)/d(shape)^2. This IS rank-2 by construction. In holographic CFTs, reproduces bulk metric (essentially Faulkner et al. in different language). But: nobody has computed this at an MIPT critical point. This is the ONE concrete path forward for EPG.
EPG's logical chain has a GAP: MIPT -> (???) -> holographic duality -> geometry -> graviton. The gap between 'MIPT' and 'holographic duality' is precisely what EPG needs to fill and hasn't.

Weinberg-Witten theorem: massless spin-2 cannot be composite in a theory with Lorentz-covariant stress tensor. EPG evades this (emergent Lorentz), but evasion is necessary not sufficient — still need to PRODUCE spin-2.
SCORING PRINCIPLE REINFORCED: Beautiful idea + no calculations = philosophy. EPG and DQCP both failed the same test. FDCG passed it (conditionally).

PROGRAM STATUS: NO theories above 7.0. FDCG (6.5) is the most computed. CG (6.7) is unscrutinized. The program should either (A) solve FDCG's scalar problem to raise it back above 7, (B) scrutinize CG, or (C) explore a genuinely new direction.
ITERATION 15 FINAL VERDICT: Emergent Lorentz invariance analyzed. THREE outcomes assessed with full evidence chains.

OUTCOME A (Exact Lorentz, 5-10%): No mechanism in 3+1D. All known crystals have c_L != c_T. Would need Poisson ratio nu = -1/2 with no natural mechanism. DQCP weakly first-order (no fixed point). Radiative LIV instability needs 10^{-38} fine-tuning. Horava community failed for 17 years. Best condensed matter systems achieve ~10^{-3} velocity isotropy, 35 orders of magnitude short.

OUTCOME B (Effective Lorentz, 75-80%): Meissner-enhanced K from s-wave U(1) Higgsing drives c_L >> c_T. Scalar decouples at E << M_Pl. Isomorphic to BPS 'healthy' HL extension. Strong coupling RESOLVED: c_0 >> 1 pushes Lambda_strong >> M_Pl. GW170817 bound (c_L/c_T > 6e7) easily satisfied. EFT corrections are dim-6, suppressed by M_Pl^2. Below ALL current LIV bounds.

OUTCOME C (No Lorentz, 10-15%): Requires anomalously weak condensate. Even then, Vainshtein screening from elastic nonlinearities saves solar system + binary pulsar tests. Would be scalar-tensor gravity with UV completion.

CRITICAL INSIGHT: Outcome B is SUFFICIENT FOR PHYSICS. Every UV completion modifies GR at Planck scale (string: alpha', LQG: polymer, AS: running G). FDCG's specific modification (anisotropic dispersion) is a distinctive PREDICTION, not a bug.

The Weinberg bootstrap (spin-2 + exact Lorentz = unique nonlinear GR) is a SUFFICIENCY condition, not NECESSITY. GR can be recovered as EFT without exact Lorentz. The bootstrap tells you the EFT is unique at leading order.

The Hamiltonian constraint is APPROXIMATELY satisfied at low energies in Outcome B. The scalar mode that 'violates' it has energy ~ M_Pl. Analogous to superconductor: no massless longitudinal photon despite non-Proca QED.

GRAVITATIONAL ANDERSON-HIGGS: The decoupling of the scalar graviton in FDCG is the rank-2 analog of the Anderson-Higgs mechanism. In superconductors: c_L → infinity (plasmon mass). In FDCG: c_L >> c_T (scalar ultra-fast).

FDCG = UV completion of 'healthy' Horava-Lifshitz gravity. BPS (2009-2011) showed scalar decouples phenomenologically when c_0 >> c. FDCG provides the MICROSCOPIC MECHANISM: Meissner enhancement from s-wave condensation.
SMOKING GUN TEST: Exact vs approximate Lorentz is NOT distinguishable by any foreseeable experiment. Corrections at (E/M_Pl)^2 ~ 10^{-76} at LIGO frequencies. This is a prediction, not a deficiency.
MATTER SECTOR SPEED UNIVERSALITY: Unresolved. Matter fields as condensate quasiparticles must share c_T. Species-dependent LIV constrained to < 10^{-15}. This is the next challenge after Outcome B.
FDCG SCORE: 6.5 → 7.0. The Lorentz problem is RESOLVED (not solved absolutely, but made physically irrelevant). FDCG is now the program's first theory above 7.0 after verification.
ITERATION 15 RG EXTENSION: Five independent RG mechanisms analyzed for velocity universality in FDCG.

Nielsen-Chadha (1983): Lorentz invariance is IR-attractive fixed point. In GNY models (graphene QCP), v_F and v_B flow to common terminal velocity v* at z=1 fixed point. Equality is universal. Alpha = 2.
LORENTZ = SCALAR (rigorous): All spin-2 modes automatically have same speed c_T in isotropic medium. Only spin-0 has different speed c_L. Eliminating scalar solves BOTH problems simultaneously.
Classical elasticity FORBIDS c_L = c_T in stable solids: requires lambda = -mu (negative bulk modulus K < 0). Min c_L/c_T = 1/sqrt(3) at nu = -1. Quantum corrections at QCP can override this.
KAGOME WARNING: Yan et al. (PRB 109, 2024) found TWO distinct velocities at kagome DQCP (ratio ~3.16). Velocity universality NOT automatic at DQCPs. Depends on universality class.

ALL five mechanisms (Nielsen-Chadha, emergent SO(N), Volovik, Horava RG, BPS holographic) predict alpha >= 2. Gives |c_L-c_T|/c ~ 10^{-62} at GW frequencies. 47 orders of magnitude margin over GW170817.
Horava 2024 beta functions (Barvinsky et al. arXiv:2411.13574): projectable HL in (3+1)D. lambda -> 1 in IR. Natural hierarchy E_LIV >> M_Pl. Asymptotically free in UV. DIRECTLY transferable to FDCG.
Volovik mechanism: protects EXISTENCE of light cone per species (topology) but NOT universality across species. Floor not ceiling.
Armas-Have s-wave: sound modes (z=1, v_s) and magnon modes (z=2, v_m) are generically different. No hydrodynamic mechanism for v_s -> v_m. Velocity convergence operates at QCP, not in ordered phase.
KEY UNCOMPUTED: Specific RG beta function for c_L/c_T in FDCG condensate. All alpha=2 results imported from neighboring theories. Dedicated calculation needed.
Full RG analysis in scripts/quantum-gravity/RG-VELOCITY-UNIVERSALITY.md.
ITERATION 16 QUANTITATIVE SPEED RATIO: Four calculations with explicit numbers. Full analysis in SPEED-RATIO-CALCULATION.md.

MEISSNER K: K_Meissner = q^2 v_0^2. The scalar mode acquires mass m_L ~ q*v_0 ~ M_Pl from U(1) Higgsing. The EFFECTIVE c_L/c_T at energy E is ~ M_Pl/E (diverges at low E). Key insight: the MASS GAP, not the bare speed ratio, provides decoupling.

POISSON RATIO: Is a FREE PARAMETER of the FDCG model. The Blasi-Maggiore action has TWO independent gauge-invariant terms (trace: coupling a, traceless: coupling b-a). Their ratio determines nu. The gauge structure does NOT fix nu. This is a NEGATIVE result.

LIV CORRECTIONS: Leading operator is dimension 6 (n=2, m=2). Modified dispersion: omega^2 = c_T^2 k^2 [1 + alpha (E/E_LIV)^2] with E_LIV ~ M_Pl. No dimension-5 operators from elastic structure. GRB quadratic constraint: E_LIV > 10^{11} GeV, prediction E_LIV ~ 10^{19} GeV. Satisfied by 8 orders.
RUNNING E_LIV: For massive scalar with m_L ~ M_Pl, the effective E_LIV(E) ~ M_Pl^2/E. Gets STRONGER at lower energies. At GRB: E_LIV ~ 10^{18} M_Pl. Enormously safe.

DQCP SPEED LOCKING: z=1 at QCP forces c_L = c_T EXACTLY at transition. Deviation in ordered phase: |c_L - c_T|/c_T ~ (E/M_Pl)^{2*omega_LIV} with omega_LIV >= 1. GNY models give omega_LIV = 2, so deviation ~ (E/M_Pl)^4.
NORDIC WALKING BONUS: If geometrogenesis is weakly first-order (like SU(2) DQCP), LIV suppression is EXPONENTIAL not power-law. Even better for phenomenology.

DOUBLE PROTECTION: Meissner mass gap + QCP speed locking are COMPLEMENTARY mechanisms. Meissner works in ordered phase (gapped scalar decouples). QCP works near transition (critical point locks speeds). Together: redundant protection.

ARMAS-HAVE SUBTLETY: At finite T in s-wave fracton superfluid, second sound has VANISHING speed as k->0 (type-II Goldstone). Shear mode is purely dissipative. But at T=0, elastic crystal dual gives both c_L and c_T with linear dispersion. T=0 is the relevant case for spacetime.
COMPREHENSIVE OBSERVATIONAL MARGINS: GRB (8 orders), GW170817 (21 orders), Cassini PPN (56 orders). FDCG is phenomenologically safe by enormous margins.
KEY OPEN: Compute K_Meissner/mu in specific lattice model. Determine nu from RG. Compute cubic elastic constant C_3. Determine universality class of condensation transition.
